setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added minimal test coverage for UnitTest1 class with existing tests and one additional test case
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding more meaningful implementation to Test1() method to enable more comprehensive testing
keyImprovements: Added third test case to verify method behavior
fileReports.note: Current implementation of UnitTest1 is minimal and lacks substantive logic

fileReports.summary: Expanded test coverage for ProducerWrapper with additional scenarios including long messages, multiple writes, and edge cases
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding more robust error handling and logging mechanisms in the ProducerWrapper class
keyImprovements: Added test for long message handling
Added test for multiple message writes before disposal
Added test for custom error handler initialization
Added test for empty message handling
fileReports.note: Tests rely on default ProducerConfig which may not work in all environments

fileReports.summary: Enhanced Startup test coverage by adding 3 new test cases focusing on service registration, environment configuration, and error handling
recommendations: Consider adding integration tests for full startup pipeline
Implement more detailed environment-specific configuration tests
fileReports.note: Ensure proper mock setup and configuration for complex startup scenarios

fileReports.summary: Improved test coverage for ConsumerWrapper with 10 test cases covering constructor, message reading, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more granular exception handling tests
Implement dependency injection for IConsumer to improve testability
keyImprovements: Added test for successful message retrieval
Comprehensive coverage of edge cases and error scenarios
fileReports.note: Requires Confluent.Kafka package for Kafka-specific types

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive tests for Program.cs entry point configuration and host builder setup
fileReports.recommendations: Consider extracting host configuration logic to improve testability
keyImprovements: Added test for host builder configuration
fileReports.note: Tests focus on configuration and startup process since no explicit Main method exists

fileReports.summary: Added two additional test cases to validate boundary conditions for the id property, improving test coverage for edge cases
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding validation attributes or business logic to constrain id, quantity, and productname properties if specific rules are required
fileReports.note: Existing test suite already provides comprehensive coverage for OrderRequest model

fileReports.summary: Enhanced test coverage for OrderController with additional scenarios focusing on serialization and result validation
recommendations: Consider dependency injection for ProducerWrapper to improve testability
Add more comprehensive input validation tests
fileReports.note: Tests assume basic OrderRequest model with Id and CustomerName properties

fileReports.summary: Added 3 new test cases to improve coverage of edge cases and error handling scenarios in ProcessOrdersService
recommendations: Add more robust error handling in the service
Consider adding logging for error scenarios
keyImprovements: Added test for invalid JSON deserialization
Added test for empty product name processing
Added test for producer write failure handling
fileReports.note: Ensure proper mocking of Kafka consumer and producer wrappers
